label: Transparent mesa motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a high desert mesa silhouette motif, isolated full subject, no surrounding landscape, no props, no text.
Subject: A layered red-rock mesa butte with broad flat top, stepped sandstone strata, eroded cliff faces, subtle sage-green desert scrub accents at the base, and small sky-blue mineral highlight shadows only where naturally plausible. The silhouette should be instantly recognizable as a mesa.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the flat top, stepped sides, base, or any visible strata.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves red rock texture, weathered sandstone layers, sage green accents, and crisp silhouette for a layered storytelling design system.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no sky, no horizon, no full canyon landscape, no people, no animals, no vehicles, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Mesa" derived from an isolated high desert mesa silhouette motif.
Reference motif: layered red-rock mesa butte, broad flat top, stepped sandstone strata, eroded cliff faces, sage-green desert scrub accents, clear sky-blue environmental memory, warm high-desert light, crisp mesa silhouette. The design mood is a layered storytelling system: cards and panels should feel like visible geological strata and progressive narrative layers.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board composition intended for 3840 x 2160 final asset. Fill the full canvas with a clean design board, no outer frame.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, large readable labels, no dense tiny text.
Required visible sections with readable headings: Morphous Mesa, Mesa, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance for a storytelling editorial-product system.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, layered sandstone dividers, restrained editorial storytelling rhythm, quiet operational clarity.
Color palette: motif-derived only: red rock #b75a35, canyon clay #d48352, mesa shadow #5a3329, sage green #8a9a69, dry sage #c0b88f, sky blue #8ec4dc, pale sandstone #f3e6d2, dune surface #dfc8a8, ink shale #231c18. Avoid generic purple gradients and unrelated saturated colors.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs. Exact spelling: "Morphous Mesa".
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling, no tiny illegible token tables, no stock-photo background, no unrelated colors.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Mesa design-system board. It must feel like the same layered storytelling system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference motif and system: isolated high desert mesa silhouette; layered red-rock butte with broad flat top, stepped sandstone strata, eroded cliff faces, sage-green desert scrub accents, sky-blue atmospheric highlights. Preserve the light board language: geological strata dividers, narrative layer panels, restrained editorial-product UI, 8px radius, shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board composition intended for 3840 x 2160 final asset. Fill the full canvas with a clean design board, no outer frame.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, large readable labels, no dense tiny text.
Required visible sections with readable headings: Morphous Mesa, Mesa, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background from ink shale and mesa shadow, cards in deep sandstone umber, foreground text in pale sandstone, primary accents from red rock, secondary accents from sage green, supporting sky-blue focus rings, canyon-clay warnings, subtle layered rock grain and strata separators. Maintain clear contrast and practical dashboard readability.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Color palette: motif-derived only: ink shale #231c18, mesa shadow #5a3329, red rock #b75a35, canyon clay #d48352, sage green #8a9a69, dry sage #c0b88f, sky blue #8ec4dc, pale sandstone #f3e6d2, dune surface #dfc8a8.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs. Exact spelling: "Morphous Mesa".
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling.
